name: Adt Unstick PR
description: Recover a PR whose head SHA disagrees with its branch ref (webhook desync). Force-push and close+reopen rarely fix it — recreate the PR.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Adt Unstick PR
pt-BR.description: Recupere um PR cujo head SHA discorda do ref da branch (webhook desync). Force-push e close+reopen raramente resolvem — recrie o PR.
